summary: Tested new features: StylingPage comments/image upload, WIPOrdersPage Order Details modal with styling images and conditional pricing. Found bug in LinkMeasurementPage product type matching.

ui_bugs.issue: Product type defaults to 'Jacket' instead of matching order's product 'Suits'. The matching logic fails because 'suits' (plural) doesn't match '2 pc Suit' or '3 pc Suit' (singular).
ui_bugs.root_cause: Line 66-69 in LinkMeasurementPage.jsx: The matching logic uses includes() which fails for 'suits' vs 'suit' (singular/plural mismatch)
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Normalize both strings by removing trailing 's' or use a more flexible matching like checking if either string starts with the other's base form

action_items: Fix LinkMeasurementPage product type matching to handle singular/plural forms (e.g., 'Suits' should match '2 pc Suit')
critical_code_review_comments: LinkMeasurementPage.jsx lines 66-69: The product type matching logic is too strict. Consider normalizing strings by removing trailing 's' or using a more flexible matching algorithm.
seed_data_creation: Created WIP orders with comments via UI flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested: 1) StylingPage comments (data-testid='styling-comments') and image upload (data-testid='styling-image-upload') work correctly. 2) WIPOrdersPage Order Details modal shows styling option images, comments, and conditionally displays pricing based on show_pricing flag. 3) BUG: LinkMeasurementPage defaults to 'Jacket' instead of matching 'Suits' product - the matching logic in lines 66-69 fails because 'suits'.includes('2 pc suit') and '2 pc suit'.includes('suits') both return false due to singular/plural mismatch.

styling_comments.details: Comments textarea (data-testid='styling-comments') accepts input and saves to order

styling_image_upload.details: Upload Image button present with data-testid='styling-image-upload'

order_details_styling_images.details: Order Details modal displays styling option images (not just text names)

order_details_comments.details: Order Details modal displays comments from styling in blue-highlighted box

order_details_conditional_pricing.details: Pricing section shown when show_pricing=true, hidden when show_pricing=false

link_measurement_product_default.details: BUG: Page defaults to 'Jacket' instead of matching order's product 'Suits'. Root cause: singular/plural mismatch in matching logic

homepage_loads.details: Homepage loads correctly with mock.js restored

bug_rca.issue: LinkMeasurementPage defaults to wrong product type
reproduction_steps: 5. Observe: 'Jacket' checkbox is selected instead of '2 pc Suit' or '3 pc Suit'
bug_rca.root_cause: In LinkMeasurementPage.jsx lines 66-69, the matching logic uses: orderProductName.includes(pt.name?.toLowerCase()) || pt.name?.toLowerCase().includes(orderProductName). For orderProductName='suits' and pt.name='2 pc Suit', both conditions fail because 'suits' doesn't include '2 pc suit' and '2 pc suit' doesn't include 'suits' (note the 's' difference).
bug_rca.suggested_fix: Modify the matching logic to handle singular/plural forms. Options: 1) Remove trailing 's' from both strings before comparison, 2) Use a more flexible matching like checking if the base word 'suit' is present in both strings, 3) Use a fuzzy matching algorithm
